Test Objective: Validate 'YAML' variant for Packaging against Install the Neo4j Operator.

Verify AC-OP-INSTALL-001: Operator CRDs are installed and available through the Kubernetes API. | 6. Verify AC-OP-INSTALL-002: Operator deployment is created in the target namespace. | 7. Verify AC-OP-INSTALL-003: Operator pod reaches Running and Ready state. | 8. Verify AC-OP-INSTALL-004: Operator status reports Success / Installed. | 9. Capture artifacts (events, logs, CR status) and assert test pass criteria.

Notes: Install, upgrade, and uninstall operator using Kubernetes manifests.
